# Learning Tasks

Welcome to the task-based learning path. Each task builds upon the previous one.

## Task Overview

| # | Task | Description | Estimated Time |
|---|------|-------------|----------------|
| 1 | [PyTorch Foundations](task-01-pytorch-basics/overview.html) | Tensors, autograd, nn.Module, DataLoader | 2 hours |
| 2 | [Self-Attention](task-02-self-attention/overview.html) | Query, Key, Value matrices, scaled dot-product | 2 hours |
| 3 | [Multi-Head Attention](task-03-multi-head-attention/overview.html) | Multiple attention heads, concatenation | 2 hours |
| 4 | [Transformer Encoder](task-04-transformer-encoder/overview.html) | Feed-forward, residual connections, LayerNorm | 2 hours |
| 5 | [Positional Embeddings](task-05-positional-embeddings/overview.html) | Sinusoidal and learned positional encodings | 1 hour |
| 6 | [BERT Embeddings & Encoder](task-06-bert-embeddings-encoder/overview.html) | Token + Segment + Position, pooler | 2 hours |
| 7 | [BERT Pretraining](task-07-bert-pretraining/overview.html) | MLM + NSP objectives | 3 hours |
| 8 | [BERT Finetuning - Classification](task-08-bert-classification/overview.html) | Sentiment analysis task | 2 hours |
| 9 | [BERT Finetuning - QA](task-09-bert-qa/overview.html) | Question answering task | 2 hours |
| 10 | [Inference & Serving](task-10-inference-serving/overview.html) | FastAPI REST API | 2 hours |
| 11 | [Production Optimization](task-11-production-optimization/overview.html) | ONNX, quantization, TorchScript | 2 hours |
| 12 | [Advanced Exercises](task-12-advanced-exercises/overview.html) | HuggingFace compat, RoBERTa, ALBERT | 4+ hours |

## How Each Task Works

1. Read the overview to understand the concept
2. Open the notebook and follow along
3. Implement the code yourself
4. Complete the exercises
5. Run tests to verify your implementation

## Progress Tracking

- [ ] Task 1: PyTorch Foundations
- [ ] Task 2: Self-Attention
- [ ] Task 3: Multi-Head Attention
- [ ] Task 4: Transformer Encoder
- [ ] Task 5: Positional Embeddings
- [ ] Task 6: BERT Embeddings & Encoder
- [ ] Task 7: BERT Pretraining
- [ ] Task 8: BERT Finetuning - Classification
- [ ] Task 9: BERT Finetuning - QA
- [ ] Task 10: Inference & Serving
- [ ] Task 11: Production Optimization
- [ ] Task 12: Advanced Exercises
